description_long: This is a high-top sneaker with a classic silhouette, featuring a dark gray canvas upper and a white rubber toe cap. The shoe has black laces threaded through metal eyelets and a white rubber midsole with visible signs of wear and dirt, indicating regular use. On the outer ankle area, there is a circular Converse All Star patch in white with black text and a star logo. The back of the shoe displays a vertical white and blue stripe running down the heel, and the interior is lined with a light gray fabric. The tongue is padded and displays a rectangular Converse All Star label. The overall appearance suggests a durable, urban-ready shoe designed for comfort and style.
description: A dark gray high-top sneaker with a white rubber toe cap, black laces, and a visible Converse All Star logo patch. The shoe shows signs of regular wear and features a white and blue heel stripe.
description_view_0: Side view showing the dark gray canvas upper, white rubber toe cap, and the padded tongue with a visible label.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the black laces, white toe cap, and the tongue label.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the prominent circular Converse All Star patch and the overall shoe profile.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the vertical white and blue heel stripe and the worn heel area.
attribute_logo: Circular Converse All Star patch on the outer ankle in white with black text and star; rectangular Converse All Star label on the tongue in white and gray.
